kelsey-brandt.position: centered, full body airborne at the peak of a toe-touch jump, mid-frame height, camera low looking slightly up

pose.overall: textbook toe-touch: legs split wide and straight, toes pointed, torso upright and proud
pose.left_arm: extended out along the left leg line, pom-pom flared
pose.right_arm: extended out along the right leg line, pom-pom flared
pose.hands: exactly two hands, both hers, both gripping flared pom-poms at the ends of her extended arms

kelsey-brandt.expression: pure mid-air joy — open laughing smile, eyes wide, ponytail whipped upward

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total, both in pom-pom grips at her extended arms
she is clearly airborne — grass shadow detached directly beneath her
athletic tier-4 build per the attached turnaround: sculpted shoulders, toned core and thighs — uniform taut and FULLY covering, skirt with white brief shorts beneath
lighting: golden hour, sun low camera-left, rim light tracing her arms and legs, long shadow on the grass below
